summary: Tested new referral (parrainage) system + auto timer + analytics service_time_stats + settings.referral_threshold. Backend: 14/14 pytest passing (all endpoints validated including create/update with referred_by, self-parrainage 400, godchildren_count on list, referral info on client detail, start-timer, auto-computed duration, manual-wins-over-auto, use_referral_reward flow with is_gift/gift_source=referral + rewards_used_history + loyalty_counters not touched, public client space referral, analytics service_time_stats). Frontend: PIN unlock OK, /clients form 'new-referred-by' select works and badge 'X filleul(s) ★' appears on parrain card, ClientDetail 'referred-by-select' + Parrainage tab + referral-sponsor + referral-count/available visible, RDV timer-card + start-timer-btn + timer-elapsed increments live + restart-timer-btn present, Analytics service-time-stats section rendered, /reglages set-referral-threshold input renders value 4, public client space (Sophie) shows referral-card in Fidélité tab.
critical_code_review_comments: appointments.finish: auto duration uses max(1, min(240, mins)) — correct spec (>=1min, cap 240).
referrals.compute_referral_info: rewards_available = max(0, earned - used) — safe against negative if history longer than earned.
clients_update pops legacy 'referrals' field before persist — good migration hygiene.
loyalty logic in finish: referral-gift services are `continue`d in loyalty loop (no reset, no increment) — matches spec. Non-referral gifts still reset the counter as expected.
public.py: referral is exposed on GET /public/client/{token} — includes threshold + counts. Good.
Frontend AppointmentForm timer-card correctly hides after status=done and elapsed increments client-side via setInterval. No issue observed.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ clients + appointments via pytest — all cleaned up in module fixture teardown. Also created 1 TFront1 client + linked to Marie Dupont as parrain via UI (deleted via UI window.confirm). One accidental Sophie RDV rdv_f9374aa3d3 (created during initial Playwright RDV-nouveau attempt) was manually deleted; started_at reset on rdv_a67c9cf136 (Sophie seed RDV) so no leftover timer state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All parrainage + timer + analytics features are green backend & frontend. referral-reward-banner in AppointmentForm was NOT visually observed because seed clients have 0 filleuls; backend end-to-end has been fully validated (test_use_referral_reward_at_finish). If needed, main agent can seed one client with 4 filleuls to visually demo the UI banner + toggle.
